upgrades.name: Guided Magic
upgrades.description: Magic shots last longer and seek out the Bloons, even behind cover.

upgrades.name: Arcane Blast
upgrades.description: Bigger, more powerful magic blasts pop through 2 layers of Bloon.

upgrades.name: Arcane Mastery
upgrades.description: Faster attacks with increased range, damage, and popping power.

upgrades.name: Arcane Spike
upgrades.description: Faster firing magic does huge damage to most Bloon types, especially to MOABs.

upgrades.name: Archmage
upgrades.description: A true master of magical wizardry. Attacks faster and does more damage to MOAB-class Bloons.

upgrades.name: Fireball
upgrades.description: Every few seconds casts an explosive fireball spell.

upgrades.name: Wall of Fire
upgrades.description: Creates a super hot wall of fire across the track to roast the Bloons as they pass.

upgrades.name: Dragon's Breath
upgrades.description: Spews endless flames at nearby Bloons and enhances Fireball and Wall of Fire.

upgrades.name: Summon Phoenix
upgrades.description: Summon Phoenix ability: Powerful phoenix wreaks Bloon havoc for 20 seconds.

upgrades.name: Wizard Lord Phoenix
upgrades.description: Wizard Lord becomes a master of the flame, turning into a super powerful Lava Phoenix for a short time.

upgrades.name: Intense Magic
upgrades.description: More powerful magic shots move faster and can pop more Bloons.

upgrades.name: Monkey Sense
upgrades.description: Increases range slightly and allows the Wizard to hit Camo Bloons.

upgrades.name: Shimmer
upgrades.description: Gains a dark magic attack that periodically reveals location of all nearby Camo Bloons permanently.

upgrades.name: Necromancer: Unpopped Army
upgrades.description: Reanimate recently popped enemies as servants that can destroy Bloons of any type.

upgrades.name: Prince of Darkness
upgrades.description: Reanimate even more powerful Bloon servants to obliterate the enemy and enhances all other Necromancers.
